rows.CNzh: 上面似乎写着嘤嘤天堂的推荐食谱。
rows.TWzh: 上面似乎寫著嚶嚶天堂的推薦食譜。
rows.JPja: ちゅん<Ruby={4:8}てんどう>天堂のおすすめレシピが<Ruby={2:2}か>書いてあるようだ
rows.USen:
It looks to be a collection of the Slippery
Falcon's recommended recipes.

rows.CNzh:
首先，
请在本店购买<Color=red>山羊黄油<Color=white>。
rows.TWzh:
首先請購買
本店的<Color=red>山羊奶油<Color=white>。
rows.JPja:
まずは<Ruby={4:8}とうてん>当店で <Color=red>ヤギのバター<Color=white>を
お<Ruby={2:2}か>買い<Ruby={2:4}もと>求めください
rows.USen:
First, you'll want to buy <Color=red>goat butter <Color=white>here
at the Slippery Falcon.

rows.CNzh:
只要把<Color=red>山羊黄油<Color=white>和<Color=red>苹果<Color=white>放在一起烹调，
就可以制作出<Color=red>黄油苹果<Color=white>啦♪
顺便一提，放入<Color=red>暖暖草果<Color=white>的话，
吃下后身体会从内而外变得暖暖的哦～
rows.TWzh:
只要將<Color=red>山羊奶油<Color=white>和<Color=red>蘋果<Color=white>放在一起調理，
就能製作出<Color=red>奶油蘋果<Color=white>啦♪
順便一提，如果加入<Color=red>暖暖草果<Color=white>的話，
就能讓身體從內部變得暖暖的喔～
rows.JPja:
<Color=red>ヤギのバター<Color=white>と<Color=red>リンゴ<Color=white>を <Ruby={4:8}いっしょ>一緒に<Ruby={4:8}りょうり>料理するだけで
<Color=red>リンゴバター<Color=white>の<Ruby={4:8}かんせい>完成です♪
ちなみに <Color=red>ポカポカ<Ruby={2:4}そう>草の<Ruby={2:2}み>実<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:2}い>入れれば
<Ruby={2:6}からだ>体の<Ruby={2:4}しん>芯からポカポカ<Ruby={2:6}あたた>温まりますよ～
rows.USen:
Simply cook <Color=red>goat butter <Color=white>and an <Color=red>apple<Color=white>
together, and the <Color=red>hot buttered apple<Color=white>
is complete!<PageBreak>Adding a <Color=red>spicy pepper<Color=white> to the mix is a
good way to warm up your whole body.

rows.CNzh:
首先，请在本店购买<Color=red>塔邦挞小麦<Color=white>、
<Color=red>山羊黄油<Color=white>和<Color=red>蔗糖<Color=white>。
rows.TWzh:
首先，請購買本店的
<Color=red>塔邦撻小麥<Color=white>、<Color=red>山羊奶油<Color=white>和<Color=red>蔗糖<Color=white>。
rows.JPja:
まずは<Ruby={4:8}とうてん>当店で <Color=red>タバンタ<Ruby={4:6}こむぎ>小麦 ヤギのバター
きび<Ruby={4:6}ざとう>砂糖<Color=white>を お<Ruby={2:2}か>買い<Ruby={2:4}もと>求めください
rows.USen:
First, you'll want to buy <Color=red>Tabantha wheat<Color=white>,
<Color=red>goat butter<Color=white>, and <Color=red>cane sugar<Color=white> here at the
Slippery Falcon.

rows.CNzh:
将这3种食材和<Color=red>树果<Color=white>一起烹调的话，
就可以制作出坚果蛋糕啦～
或许也可以用<Color=red>苹果<Color=white>
来代替树果～？
rows.TWzh:
將這3種食材和<Color=red>樹果<Color=white>一起調理的話，
就可以製作出堅果蛋糕啦～
如果用<Color=red>蘋果<Color=white>之類的
來代替樹果或許也不錯喔～？
rows.JPja:
それら3<Ruby={2:4}しゅ>種と <Color=red><Ruby={2:2}き>木の<Ruby={2:2}み>実<Color=white>を<Ruby={4:8}いっしょ>一緒に<Ruby={4:8}りょうり>料理すれば
ナッツケーキが できますよ～
<Ruby={2:2}き>木の<Ruby={2:2}み>実の<Ruby={2:2}か>代わりに
<Color=red>リンゴ<Color=white>とかを<Ruby={2:2}い>入れても いいかも～？
rows.USen:
Toss these three ingredients in a pot
alongside your favorite type of <Color=red>nut<Color=white> to
make nutcake.<PageBreak>And for an added kick, try substituting
the nut with something else! An <Color=red>apple<Color=white> is
a good starting point to experiment with.

rows.CNzh:
首先，请在本店购买
<Color=red>塔邦挞小麦<Color=white>和<Color=red>山羊黄油<Color=white>。
rows.TWzh:
首先，請購買本店的
<Color=red>塔邦撻小麥<Color=white>和<Color=red>山羊奶油<Color=white>。
rows.JPja:
まずは<Ruby={4:8}とうてん>当店で <Color=red>タバンタ<Ruby={4:6}こむぎ>小麦
ヤギのバター<Color=white>を お<Ruby={2:2}か>買い<Ruby={2:4}もと>求めください
rows.USen:
First, you'll want to buy <Color=red>Tabantha
wheat <Color=white>and <Color=red>goat butter<Color=white> here at the
Slippery Falcon.

rows.CNzh:
随后，准备好喜欢的<Color=red>鱼<Color=white>和<Color=red>岩盐<Color=white>，
把它们放在一起烹调，就可以制作出<Color=red>鱼肉派<Color=white>啦♪
<Color=red>岩盐<Color=white>可以通过开采矿床获得哦～
rows.TWzh:
接著準備好喜歡的<Color=red>魚<Color=white>和<Color=red>岩鹽<Color=white>，
一起調理後就可以製作出<Color=red>魚肉派<Color=white>啦♪
<Color=red>岩鹽<Color=white>可以透過開採礦床獲得喔～
rows.JPja:
<Ruby={2:4}あと>後は お<Ruby={2:2}す>好きな<Color=red><Ruby={2:6}さかな>魚<Color=white>と<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}がんえん>岩塩<Color=white>を<Ruby={4:6}ようい>用意して
<Ruby={4:8}いっしょ>一緒に<Ruby={4:8}りょうり>料理すれば <Color=red>フィッシュパイ<Color=white>の<Ruby={4:8}かんせい>完成です♪
<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}がんえん>岩塩<Color=white>は<Ruby={4:10}こうしょう>鉱床から<Ruby={2:2}と>採れますよ～
rows.USen:
Along with those, add <Color=red>rock salt<Color=white> and your
choice of <Color=red>fish <Color=white>and cook them all together.
Ta-da! A <Color=red>fish pie<Color=white> ready to eat!<PageBreak>If you don't have <Color=red>rock salt<Color=white>, you might find
some by mining from ore deposits.

rows.CNzh:
由于暴风雪的影响，
部分商品还未进货，请您谅解～
rows.TWzh:
由於暴風雪的影響，部分商品無法確認交期，
還請您多多諒解～
rows.JPja:
<Ruby={4:6}ふぶき>吹雪の<Ruby={4:10}えいきょう>影響で <Ruby={8:14}にゅうかみてい>入荷未定の<Ruby={4:10}しょうひん>商品があります
どうか ご<Ruby={4:12}りょうしょう>了承くださいませ～
rows.USen:
Some ingredients may be in short supply
due to the blizzard. We appreciate your
patience as we restock.
